{{CargoOrgan
|name=Divine Slug Abs
|type=Common
|rank=orange
|id=10872
|idx=79
|description=Worshippers of the wish-granting Dragon Orbs became increasingly fanatic—some even sculpted their abs into the shape of Dragon Orbs, praying for divine blessings through sheer abdominal dedication.
|skill=
|hp=1872
|def=184
|atk=291
|rush=183
|gene1=For every 3 dragon descents, obtain 30 W-tadss
|gene2=Minion Recovery SPD +6%
|gene3=For every 3 dragon descents, obtain 30 W-tadss
|gene4=Dragon Minion Cloning SPD +3%
|gene5=For every 3 dragon descents, obtain 30 W-tadss
|gene7=Minion Recovery SPD +6% (Awakened)
|}}
